title: Music Disc Expansion
description: adds music discs from many popular and unpopular songs to the game.
body:
adds new music discs to the game, Currently its 15.
Some of Them:
- PvZ - Loonboon
- Unknown - Maxwell the Cat
- GoT - Game of Thrones main Theme
- Ottoman Empire - Ceddin Deden
- KSI - Thick of It
